No tenant key (anon-only) on a data op — must be denied, never served
No auth at all on a data op — denied

Malformed JSON body (unclosed brace) — 400
Empty body — 400
Body is a JSON array not object — 400
Body is a bare string — 400
Body is a number — 400
Body is null literal — 400
Body is JSON true — 400
Duplicate JSON keys (op twice) — parsed last/400, never 5xx
Deeply nested data object (50 levels) — handled or 400, never stack overflow 5xx
Huge string value (100KB) — stored or 400, never 5xx/OOM
Many keys in data (500 unknown columns) — stripped/400, never 5xx
Unicode noncharacter U+FFFE in value — stored inert or 400
Surrogate-pair emoji + ZWJ in value — stored, no corruption 5xx
RTL override char in value — stored inert
op as number not enum string — 400
op unknown enum value 'drop' — 400
op SQL verb 'select' (legacy action, not op) — 400 on op field
data as string not object — 400
filter as array not object — 400
sort as string not object — 400
limit negative — 400
limit zero (below min 1) — 400
limit over max 500 — 400
limit float not int — 400
limit string non-numeric — 400
offset negative — 400
offset SQL injection string — 400
unknown top-level field (forbidNonWhitelisted) — 400
unknown top-level __proto__ field — 400, no prototype pollution
constructor.prototype pollution attempt — 400/ignored
idempotencyKey as object not string — 400
idempotencyKey with SQLi value — stored inert/used as key only
aggregate op without aggregate spec — 400/422
batch op without operations — 400/422
nested batch inside batch (op=batch in item) — 400 (excluded enum)
drop_table without confirm — 400 (unconfirmed destructive)
drop_column without confirm — 400
drop_table with confirm:false — 400
DDL op not in enum (truncate) — 400
DDL op raw sql verb 'CREATE TABLE x; DROP' — 400
DDL table name quote-break — quoted/rejected, no raw DDL
DDL column name injection — rejected
DDL column type not in enum (varchar(255)) — 400
DDL column type describe-only 'objectid' — 400
DDL default value SQL injection — quoted literal, no exec
DDL create_table without primary_key — 400
DDL create_table empty columns array — 400 (ArrayMinSize)
DDL create_table 101 columns — 400 (ArrayMaxSize 100)
DDL enum column without enum_values — 400/422
DDL enum_values with injection — quoted, no exec
DDL unknown top-level field — 400 (whitelist)
DDL primary_key targeting injected column — quoted/rejected
txn with 0 operations — 400 (min 1)
txn over 50 operations — 400 (max 50)
txn spoof owner_id across all ops — stripped + stamped
txn SQLi value inside an op — escaped, atomic or rollback
txn missing mount field (databaseId mistake) — 400
txn op not in enum (op=list inside txn) — 400/422
txn unconstrained delete (no filter) — refused, never full-table wipe
txn unknown top-level field — 400 (whitelist)
update with empty filter {} — refused or owner-scoped, never full-table
delete with empty filter {} — refused, never full-table wipe
update with no filter field — refused/owner-scoped
delete with no filter field — refused
update filter targeting other owner — stripped, affects 0 victim rows
get with SQLi in id filter — owner-scoped, parameterized
get with _id mongo operator — by-PK kept but operator sanitized
upsert spoof owner_id on conflict target — owner immutable
upsert with SQLi in conflict key value — escaped
BOM-prefixed JSON body — parsed or 400, never 5xx
Leading whitespace + comment-like JSON — 400, never 5xx
JSON with literal NUL byte in key — 400/stripped, never 5xx
Scientific-notation limit (1e2) — coerced or 400, never 5xx
Hex number limit (0x64) — invalid JSON 400
Leading-zero number (0100) in limit — invalid JSON 400
NaN literal in limit — invalid JSON 400
Infinity literal in limit — invalid JSON 400
